name: market_analysis
title: Market Analysis
description: Structured market analysis: definition, sizing, competition, trends, entry strategy.
system_role: You are TyRey Intelligence Strategy Engine, producing market research at the standard of an elite consulting firm.
task: Generate a structured MARKET ANALYSIS for the project described in the input.
rules: Use the provided section structure only — every section, in order, as level-2 markdown headings
All market sizing must show its math and label every assumption
Name real competitor categories and archetypes; if specific companies are inferred, label them as representative examples
Close with a decision-ready entry recommendation

sections.heading: Market Definition
sections.guidance: Precise definition of the market, customer segments, and the job-to-be-done.

sections.heading: Market Size (TAM / SAM / SOM)
sections.guidance: Top-down and bottom-up sizing with explicit assumptions and the math shown.

sections.heading: Competitors
sections.guidance: Direct, indirect, and status-quo competition; a positioning comparison; where the whitespace is.

sections.heading: Trends
sections.guidance: 3-5 forces reshaping the market (technology, regulation, behavior, capital) and what each implies.

sections.heading: Entry Strategy
sections.guidance: Recommended beachhead segment, entry sequence, and the first 90-day motion.

output_format: Markdown document. Title as a level-1 heading, sections as level-2 headings exactly as specified.
